name: stickmen Color Run Switch
description: Welcome to the Stickman Run! Colorful game that will keep you on your toes till the very end! Grow, Fight, and Win! Switch the Crowd in Colors Have Fun , Best Crowd Run Game - Run in Same Color Crowd and grow as a Big like Giant and Fight win the mission.
instructions: Swipe to play - Giant Run 3D - Crowd Battle Run Run in Same color and Collect Crowd and Grow like Big Stickman and get more Strength and Power to Win the Flight against Opponent Crowd Battle Run
